message:
feat(mermaid): upgrade support levels for 15 completed diagram types

Upgrade MermaidCompatibilityMatrix and DIAGRAM_FAMILY_REGISTRY for diagram
types whose parser, IR, layout, and render stages are implemented:

- State, Pie, GitGraph, Journey, Requirement: Partial → Supported
- Timeline, QuadrantChart, Sankey, XyChart: Unsupported → Supported
- PacketBeta: Unsupported → Supported
- C4Context, C4Container, C4Component, C4Dynamic, C4Deployment: Unsupported → Supported

Pipeline stages updated to reflect actual implementation status (parser + IR
+ layout + render = Done; fixtures = Partial; snapshots/pty_e2e/demo_picker
= NotStarted for newly-upgraded types).

4 types remain Partial (active agent work): Sequence, Class, Gantt, Mindmap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
